gt_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users T1 INNER JOIN posts T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(Reputation) AS max_reputation FROM users ) T3 ON T1.Reputation = T3.max_reputation
pred_sql:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(p.Id) 
FROM users u 
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId 
WHERE u.Reputation = (SELECT MAX(Reputation) FROM users WHERE Reputation IS NOT NULL)
question: Among all the posts posted by the most influential user, identify the percentage with a score above 50.
